summary: Created BackupPayload interface and collectBackupPayload() function that reads all localStorage keys and IDB stores. Includes base64 encode/decode helpers for MLS state. Chat messages are truncated to last 10 per group. createdAt uses Unix seconds. 19 unit tests cover empty state, populated data, truncation, base64 round-trip, MLS encoding, multiple groups, and malformed data.
verification_notes: Fixed createdAt from Date.now() (ms) to Math.floor(Date.now()/1000) (Unix seconds). All verification questions passed.
